⌥ projectDec 2025

Launched All Roads to Kill Bill

Spent 3 weeks mapping every film that influenced Kill Bill and every film it inspired. 200+ nodes, TMDB API, React + Three.js. What started as "I wonder if I can do this" turned into an obsession.

#data viz#cinema#react#vercel
Atlanta, GA · dimadimadima.com · @WhatWouldDimaDo
